hero.title: Live Cardiology in Your Phone.
hero.desc: Rythmio is your heart's command centre. Once Bluetooth connection with the device is established, you have full control over the study and instant insight into your body's condition.

live.title: Real-time preview.
live.subtitle: Everything you need — with one tap.

cards.title: Live ECG
cards.desc: Live mode streams the ECG signal in real time to the smartphone screen. Ideal for immediate verification of recording quality.

cards.title: Quick status
cards.desc: The refresh icon fetches the current battery level, electrode status and measurement stability confirmation from the hardware.

cards.title: Scalable view
cards.desc: ECG and heart rate charts are fully scalable horizontally and vertically. The interface adapts to phone orientation.

analysis.title: Download and Automatic Analysis
analysis.desc: Tapping the sync icon triggers a fast transfer of recorded data from the microSD card directly to phone storage.

metrics.title: Recording duration
metrics.desc: Precise timer of the recorded study

metrics.title: Heart rate trends
metrics.desc: Automatic calculation of average, lowest and highest BPM

metrics.title: Arrhythmia counter
metrics.desc: Total of recorded daily anomaly episodes

metrics.title: Graphical view
metrics.desc: Generation of daily heart rate chart and average physical activity chart

analysis.accel_note: Thanks to heart rate correlation with the built-in accelerometer, you instantly see whether a higher pulse was caused by exertion or was a concerning anomaly.

report.title: Clinical Report and AI Support
report.desc: From within the app, generate a comprehensive Clinical Report with a single click.
report.journal_desc: When you feel unwell during the study and press the bottom button on the device enclosure, the system places a marker in the signal.
report.ai_desc: The built-in AI module classifies episodes as “mild” or “critical” and provides preliminary recommendations.
report.anomaly_desc: The app automatically clips anomaly moments. All clips are fully interactive and scalable.
report.pdf: The finished report can be instantly saved as a PDF and sent to a cardiologist.

extras.title: Additional App Features
extras.subtitle: Rythmio is not just real-time measurement, but also convenient health history management.

cards.title: Dedicated Archive
cards.desc: A separate history tab collects all cardiac studies performed so far.

cards.title: Voice Assistant
cards.desc: The system regularly reads out voice messages about updated telemetry data.

cards.title: Data Security
cards.desc: All locally stored studies are subject to strict encryption. Export as PDF/CSV.

extras.warning_desc: Detection of a significant number of arrhythmic episodes by the app algorithms or AI module requires medical verification. Generated reports are for informational purposes only and do not replace professional medical diagnosis.
